## Page 364 It is also due to the high degree of alignment of the remaining items linked to the acquisition and ownership of buildings, owing to the Group's work to create an internal management framework to facilitate the adaptation of the way of working, purchasing and reporting of the teams linked to this activity in accordance with the Taxonomy's technical screening criteria. ## Page 364 ### / OpEx ## Page 364 Consistent with the foregoing, the criterion for calculating OpEx is unchanged with respect to the previous year. Consequently, eligible OpEx is observed to be approximately 0% of the Inditex Group's total OpEx in 2023. Therefore, this key performance indicator has not experienced any changes with regard to the previous financial year. ## Page 364 Image /page/363/Picture/5 description: In a medium shot, a pair of white pants hangs from a hanger in the foreground, with a busy garment factory in the background. The pants are crisp and clean, suspended from a black hanger. The factory is filled with sewing machines and workers, creating a sense of industry and activity. The lighting is bright and even, illuminating the scene. ## Page 366 (1) The Code constitutes the abbreviation of the relevant objective to which the economic activity is eligible to make a substantial contribution, as well as the section number of the activity in the relevant Annex covering the objective, i.e.: ## Page 366 - Climate Change Mitigation: CCM. - Climate Change Adaptation: CCA. - Water and Marine Resources: WTR. - Circular Economy: CE. - Pollution Prevention and Control: PPC. - Biodiversity and ecosystems: BIO. - (2) Y Yes, Taxonomy-eligible and Taxonomy-aligned activity with the relevant environmental objective. - N No, Taxonomy-eligible but not Taxonomy-aligned activity with the relevant environmental objective. - N/EL Not eligible, Taxonomy-non-eligible activity for the relevant environmental objective. - (3) EL Taxonomy-eligible activity for the relevant objective. - N/EL Taxonomy-non-eligible activity for the relevant objective. ## Page 367

## Page 368 (1) The Code constitutes the abbreviation of the relevant objective to which the economic activity is eligible to make a substantial contribution, as well as the section number of the activity in the relevant Annex covering the objective, i.e.: ## Page 368 - Climate Change Mitigation: CCM. — Climate Change Adaptation: CCA. - Water and Marine Resources: WTR. - Circular Economy: CE. ## Page 368 — Pollution Prevention and Control: PPC. ## Page 368 — Biodiversity and ecosystems: BIO. ## Page 368 (2) Y - Yes, Taxonomy-eligible and Taxonomy-aligned activity with the relevant environmental objective. ## Page 368 N – No, Taxonomy-eligible but not Taxonomy-aligned activity with the relevant environmental objective. ## Page 368 N/EL – Not eligible, Taxonomy-non-eligible activity for the relevant environmental objective. ## Page 368 (3) EL – Taxonomy-eligible activity for the relevant objective. ## Page 368 N/EL – Taxonomy-non-eligible activity for the relevant objective. ## Page 368 (4) The denominator used for the calculation of the percentages corresponds to the CapEx of environmentally sustainable activities (which comply with the taxonomy) (A.1). ## Page 368 (5) For the reporting exercise relating to the financial year 2023, it is not yet necessary to report on the alignment of activities related to the circular economy objective. However, this activity is eligible for the circular economy objective. ## Page 368 (6) Activities 7.3 and 7.7 reported for the CapEx of activities eligible according to the taxonomy but not environmentally sustainable (activities not aligned to the taxonomy) (A.2), do not include the climate change adaptation objective as they refer to the financial year 2022 reporting, where their eligibility for that objective was not reported. ## Page 368 | | Proportion of CapEx/ Total CapEx | | |---------|----------------------------------|---------------------------------| | Targets | Taxonomy-aligned per objective | Taxonomy-elegible per objective | | CCM | 3.41% | 3.41% | | CCA | 0% | 3.41% | | WTR | 0% | 0% | | CE | 0% | 0.25% | | PPC | 0% | 0% | | BIO | 0% | 0% | ## Page 369
